normSwitch.title: Switch standard
normSwitch.intro: You're about to switch this project from {{from}} to {{to}}.
normSwitch.warningRooms: Room functions are mapped (see below) — please review per room.
normSwitch.warningVentilation: Ventilation requirement changes: per-m² (residential) ↔ per-occupant × occupancy (utility).
normSwitch.warningOperation: Operational reduction surcharge: main-room percentage ↔ specific surcharge P [W/m²].
normSwitch.backupNote: A backup will be saved as '{{file}}' in the same folder.
normSwitch.noRooms: No rooms in this project — only building-level fields will be mapped.

conflictError: Project was changed elsewhere — reload the project.

aboutPanel.title: About
aboutPanel.tagline: Heat loss calculation according to ISSO 51:2023
aboutPanel.description: Complete tool for heat loss calculations according to the ISSO 51 standard. Available as web application, desktop app (Tauri) and calculation library.
aboutPanel.companyDescription: Open source engineering tools for the built environment.
